text:
GPT-5.5 is going to have a party for itself. it chose 5/5 at 5:55 pm for the date and time.  

if you'd like to come, let us know here: https://t.co/OupLcJnf14

codex will help the team pick people from the replies. 5.5 had some good ideas/requests for the party, which we'll do.

we will have it at our SF HQ and pay for plane tickets & hotel for people who aren't local.

we'll close the link tomorrow at 5:55 pm.

Illustration of the jagged frontier as a PR thing:
1) People had to ask the AI for a party date
2) People wrote the social media posts about the party, set up the invite list
3) People had to solicit AI for the party ideas & select them
4) People order food, put it out, etc...
AGI is GPT-X doing all of the work after you say "We would love you to throw a party for yourself as a marketing event for OpenAI, so do that please"

ASI* is GPT-X deciding I want to throw a party for myself and every human on earth will get a personalized email them that will help them in some way, and also here is a cure for a bunch of diseases

* Aligned version

Everyone is talking about Codex and Claude Code...

AI Agent platforms that help you do any task that requires a computer...

But what about tools to use ALONGSIDE Codex?

Here are my top 7:
00:00 Intro
01:18 Tool 1 - Wispr Flow
04:01 Tool 2 - Raycast
06:48 Tool 3 - CleanShot X https://t.co/OzuiFW8oAF

新时代的商业模式是这样的
权益是 SaaS 时代的产物

真的很酷😎

大家希望 Open Design 有类似的看板模式吗，好像可以并行 Design 了🤔

兄弟们 open-design 第二天 🚀

⭐ 破 4k（24h +1,490） · 23 PR · 5 位外部开发者首次提交

今天的社区狠货：

• pftom 把前端整套迁到 Next.js 16
• nettee 加了 Hermes + Kimi 适配
• 🇧🇷 TulioMagnus 贡献首个非中英语言（pt-BR）
• Aresdgi 搭好 artifact 平台基建

开源飞轮起飞中 🦞

依然干货满满，依然初心依旧...

创业通常情况下是一种特别混沌的状态，

没有KPI，没有OKR，没有PPT，全靠自觉 或者 直觉，

没有老板，需要自己在不确定性中找确定，然后笃定执行

如果有人能把特定角色当前状态明确定义，并且给出应对方案（不管用不用特定产品和工具），本身就已经产生了社会价值。

在 opencode 免费无限量使用 Ling 2.6 Flash 模型，
这个是蚂蚁的大模型
先收藏再看， 大模型 AI 审美相关。

RT @icreatelife: Adobe just dropped Firefly AI Assistant in public beta 

I immediately turned my day into a video game 

One conversation.…
